ksa_text: Execute bias audits on AI systems in development and production, documenting methodology, findings, and recommended interventions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of intelligence requirements tasking systems and software

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

onet.top_element_label: Evaluating Information to Determine Compliance with Standards

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of intelligence requirements tasking systems and software
Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-T-007 (AG, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.5183 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.518, nist_ai_rmf=0.508, nice=0.400) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.5183 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AG-domain KSA AG-T-007 (composite 0.5183) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AG domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Composite 0.5183 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AG domain KSA at composite 0.5183 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5183, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
